{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work"
tags:
  * collaboration
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work


{quote}_Editorial review:_ Claude (intellectual collaboration, 2026-04){quote}

----





h2. A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work

_Draft:_ v1.0.0-draft  
_Date:_ 2026-04-19  
_Author:_ svend4  
_Editorial review:_ Claude (intellectual collaboration, 2026-04)  
_License:_ CC BY 4.0  
_Status:_ Working paper, seeking reviewers

----



----

h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

* [[152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe|AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution]] _60%_
* [[03-portal-protocol-md|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md]] _48%_
* [[73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1]] _37%_
* [[167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex|AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations]] _33%_
* [[52-author-contact|Author & Contact]] _29%_
* [[151-open-knowledge-work-foundation-md|OPEN KNOWLEDGE WORK FOUNDATION.md]] _21%_
* [[153-executive-summary|Executive Summary]] _21%_
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers]] _21%_
